# Hoppity

> Pattern-driven RabbitMQ topology for Node.js microservices, built on Rascal.

Hoppity is a composable middleware pipeline for building RabbitMQ broker topologies. Each middleware receives a Rascal `BrokerConfig` and a shared `MiddlewareContext`, can modify both, and optionally return an `onBrokerCreated` callback for post-creation setup. The builder pattern (`withTopology().use(middleware).build()`) produces a fully configured Rascal `BrokerAsPromised` instance.

## Packages

| Package | npm / Import Path | Description | Status |
|---------|-------------------|-------------|--------|
| hoppity | `@apogeelabs/hoppity` | Core middleware pipeline and builder API | Stable (pre-1.0) |
| hoppity-rpc | `@apogeelabs/hoppity-rpc` | Request/response RPC with correlation IDs and configurable timeouts | Stable (pre-1.0) |
| hoppity-delayed-publish | `@apogeelabs/hoppity-delayed-publish` | TTL-based delayed message publishing via dead-letter exchanges | Stable (pre-1.0) |
| hoppity-subscriptions | `@apogeelabs/hoppity-subscriptions` | Auto-wiring subscription handlers to broker with topology validation | Stable (pre-1.0) |
| hoppity-logger | `@apogeelabs/hoppity-logger` | Custom logger injection (Winston, Pino, etc.) into middleware context | Stable (pre-1.0) |

All packages are at version 0.2.0.

## Documentation Map

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `llms.txt` | This file — project orientation and navigation |
| `ReadMe.LLM` | Code generation cheat sheet with all types, signatures, and examples for writing correct code |
| `CLAUDE.md` | AI agent development guide for working ON this codebase |
| `README.md` | Human-facing project overview |
| `DEVELOP.md` | Development workflow, tooling, and contribution setup |
| `CONTRIBUTING.md` | Contribution guidelines and PR process |
| `.ai/UnitTestGeneration.md` | Unit test conventions and style guide (3 critical rules) |
| `.ai/UnitTestExamples.md` | Working unit test examples |
| `packages/hoppity/README.md` | Core package documentation |
| `packages/hoppity/llms-usage.md` | Core package LLM usage guide |
| `packages/hoppity-rpc/README.md` | RPC package documentation |
| `packages/hoppity-rpc/llms-usage.md` | RPC package LLM usage guide |
| `packages/hoppity-delayed-publish/README.md` | Delayed publish package documentation |
| `packages/hoppity-delayed-publish/llms-usage.md` | Delayed publish package LLM usage guide |
| `packages/hoppity-subscriptions/README.md` | Subscriptions package documentation |
| `packages/hoppity-subscriptions/llms-usage.md` | Subscriptions package LLM usage guide |
| `packages/hoppity-logger/README.md` | Logger package documentation |
| `packages/hoppity-logger/llms-usage.md` | Logger package LLM usage guide |

## Note on Experimental Packages

No packages are currently marked experimental. If any are added or marked experimental in the future, do not use or reference them unless explicitly asked.
